title: Estus
description: This Mod adds the Estus Flask from the Dark Souls Series
body:
# Estus

Simple mod that adds the Estus Flask from the Dark Souls Trilogy, featuring upgradable Potency and Flask Charges.

## Crafting Recipe
![Estus Flask Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8987cb08681017b68b012a87b3be92818c89431d.png)

## Estus Shards
![Estus Shard Item Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/670586143f6ccad49b63826c60b239ba490d5579.png)

Can be found in Buried Treasure, Desert Pyramids, Jungle Temples, Monster Spawners, Mineshafts, Ruined Portals and Trail Ruins! (Max Flask Charges are 15)

## Undead Bone Shards
![Undead Bone Shard Item Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e02fdab51e76d880ae10cc703dd866ea252fcca.png)

Has a 1% chance to drop from Skeletons (Max Potency is 5 (Instant Health 5))
